title: The Lean Startup: How Today's Entrepreneurs Use Continuous Innovation to Create Radically Successful Businesses
reason: As a Product Manager, this is exactly the kind of book I need on my shelf. Eric Ries's methodology around validated learning, iterative development, and cutting through uncertainty aligns perfectly with how I think about product development. It's practical, example-driven, and directly applicable to my daily work — helping me build better products more efficiently. Quality read with real professional value.
